backend.title: Backend Developer
steps: Learn HTTP fundamentals, request/response lifecycle, status codes
Pick a language: Node.js (JavaScript) or Python
Learn a framework: Express.js or Django/Flask
Understand REST API design principles and best practices
Learn relational databases: PostgreSQL or MySQL with SQL
Authentication & authorization: JWT, OAuth, session management
Input validation, rate limiting, and security best practices
Testing: unit tests, integration tests, API testing
Cloud basics: AWS, Azure, or GCP

frontend.title: Frontend Developer
steps: HTML5 semantics and accessibility best practices
CSS3: Flexbox, Grid, responsive design, animations
JavaScript fundamentals: ES6+, async/await, DOM manipulation
Pick a framework: React, Vue, or Angular
State management: Redux, Zustand, or Pinia
Routing: React Router or Vue Router
CSS frameworks: Tailwind CSS or Bootstrap
Testing: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress
Performance optimization: lazy loading, code splitting
Deployment: Vercel, Netlify, or cloud platforms

full-stack.title: Full-Stack Developer
steps: Testing: frontend and backend testing strategies
Cloud services: AWS or Azure basics

data-analyst.title: Data Analyst
steps: Learn SQL: queries, joins, aggregations, window functions
Excel/Google Sheets: pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas
Pandas and NumPy for data manipulation
Business Intelligence tools: Power BI or Tableau
Dashboard design and storytelling with data

machine-learning.title: Machine Learning Engineer
steps: Statistics and data analysis with Pandas, NumPy
Cloud ML services: AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI
Research papers and staying current with the field

devops.title: DevOps Engineer
steps: Version control: Git and branching strategies
CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI
Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or Pulumi
Cloud platforms: AWS, Azure, or GCP

android.title: Android Developer
steps: Android Studio IDE and project structure
UI: XML layouts, ConstraintLayout, Material Design
Coroutines and Flow for async programming

react.title: React Developer
steps: React fundamentals: JSX, components, props, state
Hooks: useState, useEffect, useContext, useMemo, useCallback
Component patterns: composition, render props, HOCs
State management: Context API, Redux Toolkit, Zustand
Forms: controlled components, React Hook Form
API integration: fetch, Axios, React Query/TanStack Query
Styling: CSS Modules, Styled Components, Tailwind CSS
Performance: React.memo, lazy loading, code splitting
Next.js for server-side rendering and full-stack React
Build tools: Vite, Create React App
Deployment and CI/CD for React apps

python.title: Python Developer
steps: Python fundamentals: data types, control flow, functions
File handling and working with JSON/CSV
Data libraries: Pandas, NumPy (for data tasks)
Code quality: linting, type hints, Black formatter

cyber-security.title: Cyber Security Specialist
steps: Networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/S, TLS
Operating systems: Linux and Windows security
Security concepts: CIA triad, threat modeling
Security certifications: CompTIA Security+, CEH, OSCP

nodejs.title: Node.js Developer
steps: Node.js runtime: event loop, modules, npm
Database: MongoDB with Mongoose, PostgreSQL with Knex/Prisma

java.title: Java Developer
steps: Java fundamentals: OOP, data types, collections
REST API development with Spring Web
Testing: JUnit 5, Mockito, Spring Boot Test
Docker and Kubernetes for Java apps
